component.name: ToonTown MultiTool
component.summary: Multitoon controller for Toontown Rewritten and Corporate Clash

description.p: ToonTown MultiTool lets you launch and control multiple Toontown Rewritten and Corporate Clash accounts at the same time. Broadcast input to up to four background toons, customize per-slot key sets, manage stored accounts via the OS keyring, and track toon stats live.
Project versioning has been restructured to a pre-1.0 alpha line to better reflect maturity. Past releases v1.0 through v2.3.0-a1 have been retagged to v0.1.0-alpha.1 through v0.6.0-alpha.2.

This release includes the Perform Action logical-action feature for TTR, a unified Held-Key Registry with hold-duration verification, and Python 3.9 CI compatibility fixes inherited from the dev branch since v0.6.0-alpha.2.

New: per-toon Keep-Alive discovery affordance, a help icon now appears next to the chat button on every toon card when Keep-Alive is disabled, with a popover that explains the feature and offers a one-click jump to the Settings group.
Refreshed Credits tab with new artwork and an updated product description.

Linux fixes: dark-mode detection on GNOME via the appearance portal with live re-theming, .desktop filename and StartupWMClass aligned with the Wayland app id so pinned launchers group correctly, SecretService keyring probe no longer blocks first launch.
